title: Vinci2: Providing Proactive Assistance in Continuous Egocentric Videos
innovation_summary: Vinci2: Providing Proactive Assistance in Continuous Egocentric Videos: To this end, we present Vinci2, a proactive egocentric assistance system that advances the on-device assistant Vinci from reactive response toward proactivity.
